title: EB and CC on the latest - Language change
scenario: Companion Card pop-up appears on Device Home Screen after language change via Device Settings even when CC and EB firmware are already up to date
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a Tern/Emu device connected where CC and EB firmware are already up to date.
3. Select any language from the list.
4. Tap the "Update Now" button to apply the language change.
5. Wait for the language change to complete.
6. Return to the Device Home screen.
expected: The CC (Companion Card) pop-up card should NOT appear on the Device Home screen, since CC firmware is already on the latest version.
